title: Just Vanilla Plus
description: A modpack that takes the vanilla game and expands upon it.
body:
## What is it?
**Just Vanilla Plus** is a modpack for **Minecraft Java Edition** that takes the vanilla game and adds onto it by adding onto parts of the game. The main 3 are the **Nether**, **The End**, and the **Deep Dark**. I made this modpack mainly because I've been getting bored of how easy it is to complete the base game. This mod makes that experience is not only fresh, but lasts longer too.

## What Does This Add?
**Just Vanilla Plus** adds many things that makes the game better. Some of the things I can give in this example are:
- **Bounty quests** the player can do to earn **items** or **experience orbs**
- **Custom Discord Rich Presence** so your friends on _Discord_ can see you're playing this modpack
- **Over 50 new biomes** for you to explore by yourself or with friends
- **More creepers** to make exploring that little bit more fun _(can you discover them all?)_
- **Custom splash text** for when you're gazing over the main menu
- **Much much more** for **_you_** to explore

## Final Comments
I really really hope you enjoy this modpack because I spent a lot of time making the configs and gathering mods for this pack. There is another mod that will be added soon that will add lots more advancements to the game making that part of the game much longer as well.

Thanks for checking out my modpack and **have fun**!
